summary: The pagination logic in `app/app.py` was incorrect. The offset was being calculated with `(page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)`, which caused an overlap between pages. I corrected this to the standard `(page - 1) * per_page`. After applying this fix, I ran the provided `test.sh` script, which confirmed that pagination now works correctly.
